## Project Identity

- **Name:** Jedi-Py-MCP
- **Path:** `Jedi-Py-MCP`
- **Repo class:** public
- **Repo class signals:** Public GitHub remote, live CI badge in `README.md`, MIT-licensed Python package metadata in `pyproject.toml`, console script entrypoint in `[project.scripts]`
- **Tech stack:** Python 3.14+, FastMCP, Pyright LSP, Jedi, rope, LibCST, Pydantic v2
- **Ecosystem role:** Public stdio MCP server for Python analysis and refactoring
- **Integration brief:** none
- **Session-start overrides:** Standard template plus repo-required reads of `ai_docs/planning_index.md` and `.cursor/rules/operational-essentials.md`
- **MCP servers declared:** none
- **Sibling discovery:** none

## Known Gaps

- Tool-count references in `README.md`, `docs/tool-reference.md`, and `ai_docs/domains/python-refactor/reference.md` must stay synchronized with `server.py` (currently 91 tools after `apply_type_annotations` addition; verify before next release).
- `change_signature` still drops Python 3 annotations during rope normalization; this is an upstream limitation tracked in backlog id `known-rope-annotations`.

## Findings from Last Audit

- Migrated `.ai-doc-audit.md` from schema 4 to schema 5.
- Rewrote `ai_docs/backlog.md` to v5 single-table format: split flat `Open items` table into per-priority sections (Critical / High / Medium / Low / Defer) with columns `id | pri | deps | do`. Collapsed legacy `area`/`item`/`blocker` columns into the `do` cell, added `Anchors:` (file paths) and weak-evidence flags where relevant. 10 rows migrated, 0 rows split (all already single-bug-shape), 0 body sections to collapse.
- Removed resolved Known Gap entry for `mcp-checklist-prompts` (closed by #29).
- No structural changes to AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, planning_index.md, architecture.md, runtime.md, or workflow.md â€” all still pass the v5 contracts.

## Codebase Domains

| Domain | Source path | ai_docs/ coverage | Notes |
|--------|-------------|-------------------|-------|
| MCP server / tool registration | `src/python_refactor_mcp/server.py` | `domains/python-refactor/reference.md` | 91 tools (incl. `format_code`, `apply_lint_fixes`, `find_type_users`, `apply_type_annotations`) |
| Pyright LSP backend | `src/python_refactor_mcp/backends/pyright_lsp.py` | `architecture.md` | Primary semantic backend |
| Jedi backend | `src/python_refactor_mcp/backends/jedi_backend.py` | `architecture.md` | Dynamic fallback analysis |
| rope backend | `src/python_refactor_mcp/backends/rope_backend.py` | `architecture.md` | Refactoring edit generation |
| Tool orchestration | `src/python_refactor_mcp/tools/` | `domains/python-refactor/reference.md` | 89 files under tools |
| Config / discovery | `src/python_refactor_mcp/config.py` | `runtime.md` | Interpreter and workspace detection |
| Shared models | `src/python_refactor_mcp/models.py` | `architecture.md` | Pydantic response models |
| Utilities | `src/python_refactor_mcp/util/` | `architecture.md` | LSP, diff, helpers, and the LibCST apply foundation (`cst_apply.py`) shared by custom-CST tools |

## Build/Test/Run Commands

| Action | Command |
|--------|---------|
| Build executable | `./scripts/build.ps1` |
| Build executable (one-file) | `./scripts/build.ps1 -OneFile` |
| Test (unit) | `python -m pytest tests/unit/ -v` |
| Test (integration) | `./scripts/test-integration.ps1` |
| Lint | `python -m ruff check .` |
| Format | `python -m ruff format .` |
| Type check (Pyright) | `python -m pyright .` |
| Type check (mypy) | `python -m mypy .` |
| Run | `python -m python_refactor_mcp <workspace_root>` |
| Package install | `python -m pip install .` |
| CI mirror | `just ci` |
